THE PERFECT PITCH
‣ Creating an irresistible offer is absolutely mandatory. All the prep
work so far has led to this point.
‣ 	This will sound weird: 	if you have any reservations inside when
constructing your offer 	it will show up in your writing.
‣ The 	opposite mental stance of empathy 	and go into your
idealized self (I liken this to the Nietzschean Superman; “A Caesar
with Christ’s soul” as Nietzsche himself put it.)
‣ You allow yourself to become your most optimized, actualized
“super-self” while writing the pitch. 	Not arrogant. 	OPTIMIZED.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 23 --

COMPONENTS OF THE PERFECT PITCH
‣ We’ll be focusing on 	5 elements:
‣ 	Offer Preframe 	(Combined With Success Traits)
‣ Offer USP 	(Just follow the formula)
‣ Offer Bullets 	(Sales Bullets…and just follow the formula :)
‣ 	Offer Social Proof 	(The Testimonials/Bonuses Trick)
‣ Offer Guarantee 	(The Triple Guarantee and 5-Point Checklist)
‣ ( Next Week: Offer Closes and Calls To Action [CTAs] )
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 23 --

THE OFFER “PREFRAME”
‣ The Preframe Technique is setting up your offer from the position of
having (a) analyzed success case studies within your niche, and (b)
the years you spent researching this to create the product.
‣ 	This “preframes” the offer as something more than a pitch – it’s 	the
collective sum of knowledge of the ultra-successful 	that only
you can bring to the table.
‣ You studied the most successful. Role-modeled their approach. Then
perfected it 	by working with your own clients/customers/etc.
‣ This takes YOU out of having to be one with all the answers and
psychologically preframes your prospect to adopt a success mindset.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 23 --

THE OFFER “PREFRAME”
‣ You’ll combine “Success Traits” within CopyPro with “Offer Preframe”
to create the following kickass preframe:
Are there patterns of the truly successful? I analyzed ___ of the top
____ success stories. They all share one thing in common: ______.
(Success Trait Details.)
It took time: __ ____ to perfect this system (blueprint/course/etc).
What resulted was a “success blueprint” you can follow. One that
works consistently. For virtually anyone. Time and time again.
Introducing 	Offer Name.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 6 of 23 --

A PREFRAME EXAMPLE
Are there patterns of the truly successful? I analyzed 	over 100 	of the
top 	weight loss 	success stories. They all share one thing in common:
they varied their carbohydrate intake throughout the week.
(Details of carbohydrate and calorie variation here.)
It took time: 	14 	years 	working with everyone from hopeless
weight loss cases to professional athletes 	to perfect this system.
What resulted was a “success blueprint” you can follow. One that
works consistently. For virtually anyone. Time and time again.
Introducing 	The 4 Day Diet.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 7 of 23 --

MANY WAYS TO USE IT
‣ This can be all in one place, condensed as you saw it on the other
slide, or spread apart as it is within my $50M Sales Letter (found
within CopyPro… hint hint homework hint… : )
‣ 	It can be altered to fit whatever your product or service may be.
Perhaps you studied other pros, for example. But the key to this
preframe is the power of 	role modeling success 	and then
perfecting a “personal blueprint” for them to follow.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 8 of 23 --

THE OFFER USP
‣ A USP is a “unique selling proposition” – the elevator pitch of your
offer.
‣ 	My USP Formula (in CopyPro) is simple to follow:
‣ The Turn 	(or Transition)
‣ The Medium 	(how your product is offered)
‣ 	The Target 	(your avatar, or expanded avatar)
‣ The Big Hairy Promise
‣ The Withouts 	(your prospect’s objections)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 9 of 23 --

THE OFFER USP
TURN: 	This resulted in the world’s first
MEDIUM: 	cyclical blueprint
TARGET: 	for men and women and fatburners everywhere
BHP: 	that empowers you to lose up to 21 pounds in 21 days
WITHOUTS: 	without exercise, counting calories, or doing without your
favorite foods
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

THE OFFER (SALES) BULLETS
‣ Bullets are hard-hitting promises, laced with a combination of hyper-
specific guarantees AND “teasers” that build insane curiosity.
‣ 	Fortunately I have a Sales Bullet Formula you’ll follow:
‣ The Lead 	(The super-attention grabber)
‣ The Verb 	(You MUST think 	juicy verbs 	when writing bullets
and usually stay away from adjectives)
‣ 	The Hook 	(The sexy promise)
‣ The Turn 	(A pivot in the story; can be as simple as ‘without’)
‣ The Close 	(close out your bullet with a promise or a CTA)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 14 of 23 --

THE OFFER SOCIAL PROOF
‣ Social proof can make or break an offer. The stronger the proof, the
easier it is to sell. 	That said:
‣ 	Proof can be scarce, or even sometimes nonexistent.
‣ Tips for getting killer testimonials FAST:
‣ Offer a 	bonus 	in exchange for 	an honest testimonial. 	(I did
this for my podcast and had 200 reviews overnight.) Email
customers (or friends who have tried your product if you have no
customers) and offer a nice bonus for an honest testimonial or
social review. 	Facebook reviews are great as they carry
instant trust.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 15 of 23 --

THE OFFER SOCIAL PROOF
‣ Tips for getting killer testimonials FAST:
‣ 	Offer a 	bonus 	in exchange for 	an honest testimonial. 	(I did
this for my podcast and had 200 reviews overnight.) Email
customers (or friends who have tried your product if you have no
customers) and offer a nice bonus for an honest testimonial or
social review. 	Facebook reviews are great as they carry
instant trust.
‣ Write a series of testimonials for customers to click on (with a
bonus offering if need-be) and frame it as a 	survey. 	Make sure
you have 10-20 prewritten testimonials and ask the customer to
choose the one that “best represents their experience.”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 16 of 23 --

THE OFFER SOCIAL PROOF
‣ Tips for getting killer testimonials FAST:
‣ 	Get testimonials 	for your bonuses. 	This is a triple-whammy.
First it gives your prospect multiple reasons to buy. If they aren’t
sold on the primary offer, a bonus with a killer testimonial (“I
would have paid 2X JUST for this bonus!”) can push someone
over the edge. Second, it adds monster social proof to your offer.
Third, you can 	sell your bonuses 	after the offer closes and use
these testimonials as your social proof.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 17 of 23 --

THE OFFER GUARANTEE
‣ Bottom line: if you use a guarantee 	you have to make it count.
‣ 	I have removed guarantees from offers and suffered little in the way
of sales, but this only works for higher dollar offers.
‣ If you must offer a guarantee (lower dollar offer, super competitive
space, etc.) then you can do one of two things:
‣ Make it as 	bold and daring as possible. 	(Story about Jason
Fladlien’s Amazon offer.)
‣ 	Use my 	“Triple Guarantee” 	approach (you can tease this
earlier in your letter to get more attention as well.)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 18 of 23 --

THE TRIPLE GUARANTEE TACTIC
‣ If you can’t offer an insane money-back or “double money back” or
Jason Fladlien-style offer, use the Triple Guarantee OR the 5-Point
Checklist Guarantee (both are my own creation, so steal at will : )
‣ 	Triple Guarantee: 	give your prospect THREE WAYS to get their
money back (it’s NOT a triple-your-money-back offer.)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 19 of 23 --

THE TRIPLE GUARANTEE TACTIC
‣ Way #1: 	BIG HAIRY PROMISE PLUS TIMELINE:
“If you don’t X within Y days, I insist on giving your money back.
You’d be an outlier, but on the off-chance the super-unexpected
happens, I couldn’t sleep at night if I took a penny of your money.”
‣ 	Way #2: 	THE EASY PEASY PROMISE:
“OR…if this isn’t the easiest ___ plan EVER…”
‣ Way #3: 	EVEN IF YOU DON’T LIKE THE FONT!
“OR EVEN… you don’t like anything about (offer)… even the FONT I
used! For any reason AT ALL, your purchase is 100% secure today.”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 20 of 23 --

THE 5-POINT CHECKLIST GUARANTEE
‣ 5-Point Checklist: 	Give your prospect a 	downloadable PDF
“Guarantee Checklist”. 	If they don’t see (promise 1, 2, 3, 4, 5) and
if all check boxes are not check OFF within ___ days, they get their
money back.
‣ 	This gives you the chance to 	future pace your guarantee. 	“Picture
this: it’s 7 days from now. Your waist is at least 2 inches smaller!
Check that box the moment you notice it!”
‣ End with, “If you don’t check off ALL FIVE, I insist on giving you a full
refund 	the very day you let me know.” (Personal wording is key.)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
